description_long: This object consists of a single elongated green leaf and a tall, upright stem bearing a cluster of small, delicate white flowers. The flowers are densely packed along the upper portion of the stem, each with multiple petals and a subtle, natural texture. The leaf is broad, lance-shaped, and has a smooth, slightly glossy surface with visible veins. There is no visible pot or container, and the base of the stem appears to be cut or unfinished. A small, colorful plant identification label is attached near the base of the stem. The overall appearance suggests a freshly cut or artificial flowering plant, suitable for decorative use in urban environments.
description: A tall, upright stem with clustered white flowers and a single broad green leaf, featuring a visible plant label. No pot is present, and the plant appears cut or artificial.
description_view_0: The broad green leaf is fully visible, lying flat, with the white flower cluster and plant label seen from the side.
description_view_1: The plant is viewed from the front, with the flower cluster and leaf aligned, and the plant label clearly visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the plant is shown, with the leaf extending outward and the flower cluster facing forward; the plant label is less visible.
description_view_3: The plant is viewed from the back, showing the underside of the leaf and the rear of the flower cluster; the plant label is not visible.
